constraints: Use the pino library for logging
Each request emits one JSON log line containing at minimum: method, path, status code, latency (durationMs), and requestId
intent.goal: Add structured request logging that emits one JSON log line per API call, capturing method, path, status code, latency, and a request id.
success_criteria: Every API route emits exactly one JSON log line per request
Each log line is valid JSON and includes method, path, status, durationMs, and requestId
Automated tests verify one-log-line-per-request, the required fields, and requestId uniqueness
